title: Burin Intaglio
description: Ce style imite le rendu d'animation 3D haut de gamme avec une texture « floquée » ou feutrée tactile distinctive appliquée à toutes les surfaces, rappelant les jouets de créateurs ou l'art des jeux mobiles modernes. Il utilise un effet d'objectif macroscopique avec une profondeur de champ extrêmement faible, rendant les sujets avec des couleurs hyper-vibrantes, un éclairage global de studio doux et des systèmes de particules de fourrure denses qui adoucissent chaque silhouette.
description_en: This style emulates high-end 3D animation rendering with a distinctive, tactile 'flocked' or felt-like texture applied to all surfaces, reminiscent of designer toys or modern mobile game art. It utilizes a macroscopic lens effect with an extremely shallow depth of field, rendering subjects with hyper-vibrant colors, soft studio global illumination, and dense, velvety fur particle systems that soften every silhouette.
description_fr: Ce style imite le rendu d'animation 3D haut de gamme avec une texture « floquée » ou feutrée tactile distinctive appliquée à toutes les surfaces, rappelant les jouets de créateurs ou l'art des jeux mobiles modernes. Il utilise un effet d'objectif macroscopique avec une profondeur de champ extrêmement faible, rendant les sujets avec des couleurs hyper-vibrantes, un éclairage global de studio doux et des systèmes de particules de fourrure denses qui adoucissent chaque silhouette.
prompt: A hyper-tactile, high-end 3D render of {{subject}}, executed in a playful, macroscopic designer toy aesthetic. The entire image must occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space with NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners, stretching entirely across the canvas. The defining characteristic of this style is a dense, velvety flocked or felt-like texture covering the {{subject}}, resembling densely packed microscopic fur or plush terrycloth. This fuzz softens the geometric contours and catches the light, creating a glowing, fuzzy halo around the edges. The color palette is hyper-vibrant and candy-like, dominated by bold {{primary_color}} with striking splashes of {{accent_color}} and smooth, gradient-like transitions into {{secondary_color}} in the background or supporting elements. The lighting is a sophisticated studio setup featuring soft global illumination, strong rim lights, and luminous subsurface scattering on any smooth, non-fuzzy elements which contrast as matte plastic or porous foam. The spatial dynamics mimic macro photography with an extremely shallow depth of field, keeping the focal point of the {{subject}} tack-sharp while the foreground and background elements melt into a creamy, smooth bokeh blur. Every surface of the {{subject}} is meticulously simulated with millions of tiny, soft hair particles standing on end, reacting dynamically to the lighting environment. The rim lighting catches these individual fibers, highlighting the {{accent_color}} and {{primary_color}} hues with brilliant luminosity. The background is a seamless, mathematically smooth gradient of {{secondary_color}}, free of any harsh textures, providing a clean stage that forces all attention onto the highly textured foreground. The interplay between the matte, flocked surfaces and the occasional smooth, plastic-like geometric primitive creates a rich material contrast. Shadows are soft, tinted, and bounced, completely avoiding harsh blacks in favor of deeply saturated ambient occlusion. The composition leverages this extreme macro lens effect to make the {{subject}} feel like a miniature, highly detailed collectible figure photographed up close., 3d render, flocked texture, felted, plush, designer toy, mobile game art, macro photography, shallow depth of field, tilt-shift, hyper-vibrant, subsurface scattering, fuzzy silhouette, velvet, procedural fur, studio lighting, rim light, ambient occlusion, playful, cartoonish, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame, no canvas, occupying entire space
prompt_removebg: A hyper-tactile, high-end 3D render of {{subject}}, executed in a playful, macroscopic designer toy aesthetic. The defining characteristic of this style is a dense, velvety flocked or felt-like texture covering the {{subject}}, resembling densely packed microscopic fur or plush terrycloth. This fuzz softens the geometric contours and catches the light, creating a glowing, fuzzy halo around the edges. The color palette is hyper-vibrant and candy-like, dominated by bold {{primary_color}} with striking splashes of {{accent_color}} and smooth transitions into {{secondary_color}} in the supporting elements. The lighting is a sophisticated studio setup featuring soft global illumination, strong rim lights, and luminous subsurface scattering on any smooth, non-fuzzy elements which contrast as matte plastic or porous foam. The spatial dynamics mimic macro photography with an extremely shallow depth of field, keeping the focal point of the {{subject}} tack-sharp while the foreground elements melt into a creamy, smooth bokeh blur. Every surface of the {{subject}} is meticulously simulated with millions of tiny, soft hair particles standing on end, reacting dynamically to the lighting environment. The rim lighting catches these individual fibers, highlighting the {{accent_color}} and {{primary_color}} hues with brilliant luminosity. The scene is composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface, replacing the gradient background and providing a clean stage that forces all attention onto the highly textured foreground. The interplay between the matte, flocked surfaces and the occasional smooth, plastic-like geometric primitive creates a rich material contrast. Shadows are soft, tinted, and bounced, completely avoiding harsh blacks in favor of deeply saturated ambient occlusion. The composition leverages this extreme macro lens effect to make the {{subject}} feel like a miniature, highly detailed collectible figure photographed up close. The fuzzy, flocked edges of the {{subject}} interact seamlessly with the flat {{background_color}} backdrop, allowing the soft microscopic fur to gently overlap the solid color. Intentional overflow is explicitly allowed, where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame and be cropped by the image boundaries, anchoring it naturally against the {{background_color}}., 3d render, flocked texture, felted, plush, designer toy, mobile game art, macro photography, shallow depth of field, tilt-shift, hyper-vibrant, subsurface scattering, fuzzy silhouette, velvet, procedural fur, studio lighting, rim light, ambient occlusion, playful, cartoonish
background_prompt: A hyper-tactile, macroscopic 3D environment featuring smooth, abstract geometric shapes and rolling hills rendered with a dense, velvety flocked texture. The scene utilizes an extremely shallow depth of field, turning distant elements into a creamy bokeh blur. The palette blends hyper-vibrant {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} across the plush surfaces, set against a seamless, mathematically smooth gradient sky of {{secondary_color}}. Soft studio lighting and strong rim lights illuminate the fuzzy silhouettes, creating a playful, toy-like miniature landscape.
background_prompt_removebg: A hyper-tactile, macroscopic 3D environment featuring smooth, abstract geometric shapes and rolling hills rendered with a dense, velvety flocked texture. The scene utilizes an extremely shallow depth of field, turning distant elements into a creamy bokeh blur. The palette blends hyper-vibrant {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}} across the plush surfaces, set against a seamless, mathematically smooth gradient sky of {{secondary_color}}. Soft studio lighting and strong rim lights illuminate the fuzzy silhouettes, creating a playful, toy-like miniature landscape. In the extreme foreground, a decorative border of oversized, out-of-focus flocked geometric blocks frames the invisible center, transitioning smoothly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. The fuzzy edges of the environment elements gently overlap and cast soft, deeply saturated ambient occlusion shadows onto the clean {{background_color}} backdrop.
